targets.expr: 1 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="node_exporter", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node_exporter", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"})
